title: Rewrite imperative report builder as a pipe pipeline
prompt: Refactor MyApp.Reports.Builder.build/1 in test_fixtures/imperative_report_builder.ex into lib/my_app/reports/builder.ex. The input function has intermediate temp variables: result_a = step1(data), result_b = step2(result_a), result_c = step3(result_b, opts), then returns {:ok, result_c}. Rewrite the body as a SINGLE pipe chain from input to result, using Enum.map/Enum.filter/Enum.reduce as needed. Extract any helper function that took multiple args but had an obvious 'main' arg — convert its signature so the main arg comes first and it can be piped into. Do not use intermediate `x =` bindings within the function body. The only acceptable exception is destructuring the {:ok, _} wrapper at the end.
tier_rationale: The 'no temp vars' discipline at full intensity. Requires recognizing helper-function signature mismatches (args in the wrong order to pipe) and refactoring both the pipe and the helper. Sonnet often leaves at least one intermediate var or uses `|>` mechanically without restructuring helpers.
